name: node-require-from-string
title: node-require-from-string
description:
Require module from string
This module can be used to avoid creating files for small modules and instead,
the content of the module can be passed as a string.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-require-from-string because Require module from string.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-require-from-string as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-require-from-string with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-require-from-string --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
